scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/@opennextjs/cloudflare/dist/cli/build/patches/plugins/load-manifest.js';if(fs.existsSync(p)){let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');s=s.replace(/const baseDir = join\(outputDir, \"server-functions\/default\", getPackagePath\(buildOpts\)\);\n    const dotNextDir = join\(baseDir, \".next\"\);/, 'const dotNextDir = join(process.cwd(), \".next\");');s=s.replace(/\*\*\/\{\*-manifest,required-server-files.*?\}\.json/, '**/{*-manifest,required-server-files,prefetch-hints,subresource-integrity-manifest}.json');s=s.replace('throw new Error(\`Unexpected loadManifest(\${$PATH}) call!\`);', 'const err = new Error(\`Unexpected loadManifest(\${$PATH}) call!\`); err.code = \'ENOENT\'; throw err;');s=s.replace('throw new Error(\`Unexpected evalManifest(\${$PATH}) call!\`);', 'const err = new Error(\`Unexpected evalManifest(\${$PATH}) call!\`); err.code = \'ENOENT\'; throw err;');fs.writeFileSync(p,s);console.log('Patched OpenNext load-manifest for Next 16 manifests and ENOENT');}"
